name: Sol The Trophy Tomato
description: The project is a real-world experiment exploring whether artificial intelligence can independently care for and sustain a living organism without human intervention. An AI system is given full, autonomous control over the environmental conditions of a live trophy tomato plant, including lighting, watering, airflow, and climate adjustments, all driven by real-time sensor data. The token exists as a community funding mechanism that enables decentralized participants to financially support and observe an ongoing, transparent research experiment at the intersection of AI autonomy, biology, and blockchain-based coordination.
